description:
2024 BMW X7 M60i Xdrive, 4.4 TC V8, 4WD, 530bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 369,000 or AED 5,781 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 54,285 KM's - BMW Warranty Until May 2029 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Until May 2029 or 100,000 KMs - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Air Suspension - Bowers & Wilkins Surround Sound System - M Sport Brake Calipers - M Sport Exhaust System - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - BMW Individual Shadowline Lights - 360 Surround View - Carbon Interior Package - Carbon Wing Mirrors - Ambient Air Package - Massage Function for Driver And Passenger - Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto - Bowers & Wilkins Surround Sound System - BMW Gesture Control - M Aerodynamics Package - Ambient Lighting Package
